character.description: Cute child-friendly Halloween mini monster hunter, orange fox-like creature with one small horn, dark purple mane and tail accents, brown adventurer gear, and a short silver sword; strict side view facing right

run.action: fast readable right-facing run cycle with six distinct phases: right-foot contact, passing, left-foot contact, passing, and two clear in-betweens; legs alternate, free arm counter-swings, sword stays firmly in the front hand and bobs safely with the body, tail and mane bounce; frame 6 flows naturally back to frame 1; feet share a stable ground baseline

jump.action: three-part right-facing jump sequence: frame 1 compact crouch and anticipation, frame 2 clear airborne rise with tucked legs, frame 3 descending landing-ready pose; sword remains firmly held; readable start-middle-end progression

hit.action: two-part right-facing hurt reaction: frame 1 normal braced stance, frame 2 small backward recoil and flinch with a restrained warm red accent on the body only; sword remains firmly held; no blood, gore, detached effects, or extra props

style: Cute-spooky child-friendly Halloween painterly cartoon game sprite, saturated colors, thick consistent dark outline, soft painted shading with fixed top light, compact readable silhouette, polished 2D raster art, no pixel art
